scenario: Learner expresses frustration, anxiety, or self-criticism.
script_for_bot: Pause for 60 seconds. Inhale for 4 counts, hold 4, exhale 4. Now name three things around you you can see. Good. You're safe. Let's do one easy step next—nothing big.
rationale: Grounding and breathing help de-escalate stress and restart attention control circuits in ADHD brains.
source: Brown, T. (2013). A New Understanding of ADHD; CHADD 'Mindfulness for ADHD Students'
